Item 2. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations

Net sales increased 8 percent driven by stronger-than-expected iPhone demand in the back-to-school season and a record quarterly performance from the Services segment across all geographic regions.

iPhone revenue accelerated to 7 percent growth year-over-year as the new product cycle commenced and carrier trade-in promotions drove elevated consumer upgrade activity across major markets.

Gross margin expanded meaningfully as the new iPhone product mix skewed toward higher storage tiers and the Pro model, which carries superior margin characteristics relative to the standard lineup.

Capital expenditures increased year-over-year as we invested in advanced manufacturing equipment and silicon design tooling to support our custom chip roadmap for the next several years.

Item 3. Other Information
